title: Strategic Engagement Group Meeting Chair’s Summary - September 2025
body: "Members of the Bar Council, Law Society and Chartered Institute of Legal Executives (CILEX) met representatives of HMCTS and Ministry of Justice (MoJ) for the latest quarterly meeting.   The meeting included verbal updates covering:     Operational and strategic overviews    The future of the Strategic Engagement Group     Presentations covered:     Adult Intensive Supervision Courts    Civil Digitisation update    Overarching evaluation of HMCTS Reform     Papers circulated in advance covered:    Jurisdictional updates  "
